jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Biocon - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
